textByHash.07bfca73ccaa001d11785fb20cb37fe7eeeb5598: I'll also charge 50,000 coins to craft the weapon.
textByHash.1cd2a03e19f836b3bbab6c8c4c18207ef4ba9ffc: I can use them to craft a potent bone weapon which will aid you when battling the Rat King.
textByHash.28e8b34371023280accab0f08a688a3337cb22f2: Ah, a Scurrius spine! A captivating subject indeed. I'll eagerly take them off your hands, and rest assured, you will be well rewarded.
textByHash.6bc766bcb131edb42eeaa68e1978d68c4b938b4d: Oh, and if you happen to come across Scurrius' spine, please bring it to me.
textByHash.7d96ce7bd9f66445290d6a2775d7c22d65017348: Okay, I'll make you the Bone staff.
textByHash.895de6f6e92222bee765f3998917c0522253d94b: If you don't want a bone weapon, I can also trade you a lamp I found during my research expedition - one for every Scurrius spine you bring to me.
textByHash.938cf55a26b036a955e8f980f3eceb64e92f9f3e: Okay, I'll make you the Bone mace.
textByHash.944a6021dafa4159aae4c8566f7d037e85d29b8d: Ahem, anyway you'll be absolutely fine, of course! Your victory awaits, I'm sure. I shall observe your progress with interest... for science, you know.
textByHash.9e913d647729b8082741a2f5ff66d7ed9d39b3f3: You'll need to bring a Scurrius spine and either a Rune mace, a Yew shortbow, or a Battlestaff. An additional 1000 chaos runes are needed if you want to create a Bone staff.
textByHash.a906e187b25675db2d9259a92f7a7390340e1a52: Well, my intrepid friend, through those broken bars lies a most remarkable discovery! I named it Scurrius, The Rat King!
textByHash.b1d9f7d43bb4dcd741cc3cabfd9d5c951167cc21: Although you can create the weapons yourself, provided you have the required expertise and appropriate materials.
textByHash.e4569f93586655c62d314121b8de075ca17f6e90: It absorbed their combat abilities, transforming itself into an obscene monster. Nature's response to intrusion, you might say! How utterly fascinating!
textByHash.e59221aa1685be2021f37d71af7bf989a3a4667d: Ah, I'll need one of Scurrius' spines to do that. Perhaps you could fetch me one?
textByHash.e6b3f8df195cba7bc2f7d59e9d83c6ee1aebf6a7: Come back when you have all the necessary materials.
textByHash.e84cea08cbb2f1f64ba6b9b77d6cfcd131f7d54a: This is no ordinary rat. It is a magnificent creature of evolution, forged by the unwitting contributions of adventurers who entered its cave.
textByHash.f50235cca510293a4d957d10eb2d37302b403f72: Of course! Scurrius spines are invaluable for my research.
textByHash.fc914e63958375b5a6ce68617bdcbb3c9921a74b: Okay, I'll make you the Bone shortbow.
